design_philosophy.core_loop: Two-player cooperative beat-em-up combat against waves of themed enemies (Jury, symbiote children) with character switching between Spider-Man and Venom
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Repetitive enemy encounters with cheap, unavoidable combat attacks creating friction rather than strategic depth
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Play as both Spider-Man and Venom (dual protagonist power fantasy) fighting alongside each other against symbiote threats
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Aggressively derivative sequel that makes no mechanical innovations over Maximum Carnage; criticisms center on complete lack of originality, repetitive design, and absence of narrative scaffolding (no cutscenes), suggesting the game prioritizes licensed IP recognition over design innovation

difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Limited; reviewers noted 'cheap combat' with 'constant flow of unavoidable hits' suggesting difficulty comes from cheap design rather than fair challenge tuning

progression.unlock_mechanism: Character choice (play as Spider-Man or Venom), noted as 'one good feature' of the game
replayability_hooks: Dual protagonist playthrough (Spider-Man vs Venom alternative runs)
Large variety of move animations (cited as positive by GamePro)

world_building_techniques: Comic book source material adaptation (Venom: Lethal Protector series)
Licensed character cameos (Captain America, Ghost Rider, Hawkeye, Daredevil provide assistance)
Symbiote-themed enemies and settings (underground city, Life Foundation headquarters)

boss_design.philosophy: Thematic boss gauntlet reflecting comic source material: five symbiote creations and Carnage as final antagonist
notable_bosses: Five symbiote children (created from removed symbiote seeds)

danger_signals: Heavily armed law enforcement (Jury) positioned as antagonists despite nominal law alignment
Underground city discovery suggesting hidden organizational structure
environmental_storytelling: San Francisco urban setting with digger confrontation
Life Foundation headquarters as final confrontation location

sources_used: wikipedia: Venom/Spider-Man: Separation Anxiety article including reception data and plot summary
